name: translate_top_face_y
description: Reference-parity: select the +Y top face of a unit cube, translate it +1.0 along Y. The 4 top verts move y 0.5 -> 1.5; the rest stay. before/after pairs are a frozen reference capture; the reference engine's vertex order differs from vibe3d's, hence the by-before-position correspondence.
source: Frozen reference capture (provenance recorded in private capture notes, not here).
